data.name: Miya & Aya: Hentai Puzzle 18+
data.detailed_description:
"Miya & Aya: Hentai Puzzle 18+" is a captivating puzzle game where players assemble images of adorable catgirls by rotating and combining puzzle pieces. Once a level is completed, the collected images are added to the gallery.

The game tells the story of two catgirls—Miya Nekohara and Ayako "Aya" Tsukimiya—who meet through ancient magic.

Gameplay

The gameplay revolves around progressing through levels:

  • At the start, the heroines appear in cute outfits.

  • As you progress, more revealing outfits are unlocked.

  • The girls interact with players, accompanying the game with their voices and sounds.

  • In the gallery, you can activate additional effects and enjoy the collected images.

Game Features

  • Hand-drawn character art.

  • Animated images.

  • Character voice acting.

Abilities:

  • Splash: Removes several unsolved puzzle pieces. Automatically regenerates.

  • Mega Splash: Removes many puzzle pieces. Charges during gameplay.

  • Highlight: Highlights unsolved pieces.

  • Falling Stars: Periodically completes missing pieces by dropping stars.

  • Shadow Trace: Occasionally flips pieces alongside yours.

  • Gallery: Allows players to view collected artwork and activate sound effects.

Characters

Miya Nekohara

  • Race: Half-kitten, half-human.

  • Appearance: Miya is petite and graceful, with short black ears, a fluffy tail, and large golden eyes. Her long black hair has a blue sheen. On weekdays, she wears a school uniform with a short skirt, while on weekends, she prefers cozy sweaters.

  • Personality: Quiet, shy, and caring. Loves warm milk, knitting, and quiet evenings. Sometimes, her feline instincts take over, which embarrasses her.

  • Special Traits: Miya has excellent hearing and can sense danger. When nervous, she fidgets with her tail or meows.

Ayako "Aya" Tsukimiya

  • Race: Catgirl from the ancient "Moon Guardians" clan.

  • Appearance: Tall and athletic, with short ears and a fluffy tail. Aya prefers a sporty style: bomber jackets, sneakers, and short shorts.

  • Personality: Spirited, energetic, and bold. A natural protector, she's willing to take risks for her loved ones. Despite this, she dreams of a peaceful life far from clan duties.

  • Special Traits: Aya is a master climber and has excellent night vision. Her agility and speed often save her in dangerous situations.

Experience stunning solo and duo artwork that reveals the personalities and stories of these charming heroines!

data.short_description: Miya & Aya: Hentai Puzzle 18+ is a captivating puzzle game where players assemble images of adorable catgirls by rotating and combining puzzle pieces. The game tells the story of two catgirls—Miya Nekohara and Ayako "Aya" Tsukimiya—who meet through ancient magic.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 簡體中文*, 俄文*, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Dual-Core Intel i5 CPU @ 2GHz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel 4xxx Series w/ 512MB VRAM or better
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel i7 CPU @ 2.6GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GTX 555 w/ 1GB VRAM or better
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.9.3
  • 處理器: Core i5 @ 2.2GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 5000
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.9.3
  • 處理器: Core i7 @ 2.7GHz+
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated standalone GPU w/ 1GB+ VRAM
